system.notes: Replacement seating. Parts cost: standard bucket 700¥, standard bench 750¥, folding bench 0¥, reinforced bench 1,500¥, reinforced bucket 1,500¥ (+100¥ per 25 kg of support over 250 kg); 6–8 CF; Avail 3/48 hrs; Street Index 1; Base Time 4 hrs. Bench-seat armor costs 1,250¥/point. Rigger 2 p.142–143.
